reference: Hi, my son is eleven months old. He is affected by cold very easily. The doctor prescribed Ambroxol and Levosalbutamol. After the intake of the syrup, he is very irritated and crying. Can I give Mucolite instead of this? Please suggest any medicine that can be given for a longer period to avoid colds.
text: Tire. My son is eleven months old. He is affected by cold very easily. The doctor prescribed opsole and levo sole buter mold. After the intake of the syrup, he is very irritated in crying. Can I give nucleolite instead of this? Please suggest any medicine that can be given for a longer period to avoid colds.
